title: Shijing: Xiao Rong (My Husband on Service)
description: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.
introduction: From the Shijing (Book of Songs) — the oldest collection of Chinese poetry, compiled by Confucius from songs of the Zhou dynasty.

translation.text: My husband is gone on the king's affairs. I do not know when he will come back. Where is he now? The fowls roost in their wall holes; in the evening the sheep and oxen come down. My husband is gone on the king's affairs — how can I but think of him?
